commands.repair_reason: - [P1] The PR needs author-supplied real behavior proof and a route-safety revision before normal maintainer review can proceed.; Needs attention: The patch introduces a concrete sensitive-data risk because frozen final reply text can be replayed through stale legacy route metadata.; Review finding: [P1] Refuse legacy route fallback for frozen finals — src/agents/main-session-restart-recovery.ts:720 (sha=689ebb4c30e06c0d25d217785833ea25d332aa7f)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds direct restart recovery for terminal main sessions with `pendingFinalDelivery=true` by sending the captured final text through `message.action` and clearing pending-final fields after success.

PR surface: Source +185, Tests +48. Total +233 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: on the PR branch, a terminal session with `pendingFinalDeliveryText` but no `pendingFinalDeliveryContext` and stale `lastChannel`/`lastTo` will enter the new non-running pending-final branch and send via the legacy session fallback. I did not run tests because this review is read-only and test execution would write artifacts.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The PR needs author-supplied real behavior proof and a route-safety revision before normal maintainer review can proceed.

target.title: [codex] fix pending final delivery recovery
target.body:
## Summary

Fix restart recovery for terminal main sessions that already have a frozen pending final reply. When a session is no longer running but still has pendingFinalDelivery=true, recovery now sends the captured final text directly through message.action send with a stable idempotency key, then clears the pending-final fields on success. Failed attempts retain the pending text and record attempt metadata for retry/debugging.

## Root cause

A channel turn can finish the model run and persist pendingFinalDeliveryText, but fail before final channel delivery clears the pending-final bookkeeping. If the session is already status=done, the existing recovery scan skipped it because it only resumed running sessions marked abortedLastRun=true. That leaves the pending final stranded and can keep later inbound turns from progressing normally.

## Validation

- npm run test -- src/agents/main-session-restart-recovery.test.ts
- npm run test -- src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-from-config.reply-dispatch.test.ts
